selections.name: Geoljak Ruby
selections.reason: Outstanding debut second behind Golden Ventus. Has the early speed to overcome any wide track bias and is clearly the horse to beat.

selections.name: Cheondunguibulkkot
selections.reason: Jumped at long odds on debut but ran a very strong third. Shows plenty of ability and can open his account here.

selections.name: Clutch Derby
selections.reason: Son of Cairo Prince making his debut. Won his barrier trial in impressive fashion and inside gate will assist.

selections.name: Newbal Socks
selections.reason: Finished fourth on debut behind Golden Ventus. Plenty of room for improvement and should build on that start.

danger_horse.name: Gold X
danger_horse.reason: Trialed nicely when second on June 25. Shackleford colt who is likely to attract market interest.

selections.name: Daedongyongma
selections.reason: Comes off a strong second-place finish on June 13. Has the tactical speed to secure a great position on this deep sand.

selections.name: Brown Jackpot
selections.reason: Faded over 7f last start but drop in distance to 6 1/2f suits. Shackleford filly well placed to bounce back.

selections.name: Blue Ribbon
selections.reason: Resuming after an 11-week break. Finished off last preparation with a solid third on a wet track. Sure to be thereabouts.

selections.name: Night Captain
selections.reason: Second-up today. Disappointed first-up but has shown much better form previously. Expect improvement.

danger_horse.name: Viva Cissimo
danger_horse.reason: Comes off a 35-day let-up. Faded last start but can easily finish right over the top of these if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Sonny K
selections.reason: Raced twice to date, finishing a strong second last start over 6 1/2f. Looks primed to break his maiden here.

selections.name: White Jackpot
selections.reason: Raced twice to date. Boxed on well for second last start. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 to save ground on the turn.

selections.name: Palpalnara
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing after a strong second-place finish first-up. Winning hope with a repeat performance.

selections.name: Naegerowajwo
selections.reason: Consistent performer who finished third last start. Nicely placed and should run another honest race.

danger_horse.name: Vicar Della
danger_horse.reason: Boxed on steadily for third last start over 6f. Capable of a better showing and commands respect.

selections.name: Yongbigyo
selections.reason: Consistent performer who has finished second in her last two outings. Draws the inside and should take a power of beating.

selections.name: Cheonghae Star
selections.reason: In great form, winning two starts back and following up with a strong second. Best form measures up well.

selections.name: Glory Day
selections.reason: Set the pace and finished a close third last start over 7f. Tactical speed is a massive asset on this deep sand.

selections.name: Trigonus
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but is capable of much better. Worth another chance at decent odds.

danger_horse.name: Hot Fever
danger_horse.reason: Tried to lead throughout two starts back when second. Has a low draw and is in the mix.

selections.name: Chowolma
selections.reason: Extremely consistent Class 5 performer. Finished fourth last start but has a great record and is the clear top pick.

selections.name: Energy Power
selections.reason: Ran on strongly from midfield to win last start over 7f. Another win is highly possible on current form.

selections.name: Haksan Sword
selections.reason: Consistent performer who finished fourth last start. Ready to peak and can bounce back here.

selections.name: Blazing Engine
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but won two starts back. Capable of a much better showing.

danger_horse.name: Hangang Fantastic
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a big finish. Finished fifth last start and could sneak into the placings at odds.

selections.name: Young Fighter
selections.reason: Ultra-consistent performer who finished third last start. Rates highly on speed figures and is the top selection.

selections.name: Fedaykin
selections.reason: Won last start in impressive fashion over 6f. Progressive type who should handle the step up to 7f.

selections.name: Flutter
selections.reason: Solid third last start over 7f. Has a great record at LetsRun Park and is among the top chances.

selections.name: One Dia
selections.reason: Won last start over 7f in good style. Expected to go well again from an inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Final Go
danger_horse.reason: Finished a close third last start over 6f. Big chance if he can replicate that performance over 7f.

selections.name: Tiger Roar
selections.reason: Top class filly who finished third in Class 3 Open last start. Inside gate is a massive advantage and she is the clear top pick.

selections.name: Wonderful Lord
selections.reason: Won two starts back and followed up with a solid fourth. Rates highly on speed figures and is the main danger.

selections.name: Seobu Champ
selections.reason: Finished a strong second last start over 1m. Swooper who will be flying late in the piece.

selections.name: Global Power
selections.reason: Consistent performer who finished sixth last start. Good effort and can build on that performance.

danger_horse.name: Western Gun
danger_horse.reason: Finished second two starts back over 1m. Disappointed last start but is capable of much better.

selections.name: Bliss Star
selections.reason: Won last start in dominant fashion. Progressive three-year-old who looks well placed to continue his winning ways.

selections.name: Royal Best
selections.reason: Won last start over 7f. Has the right credentials and tactical speed to dominate from barrier 3.

selections.name: Yongbi Hero
selections.reason: Finished a strong second last start over 1m. Tactical speed is a massive asset and he should be in the mix.

selections.name: Complete Bro
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but finished second two starts back. Capable of bouncing back from an inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Queen Dia
danger_horse.reason: Finished a solid fourth last start over 1m. Should be right in the finish on her best form.

selections.name: G B Vault
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after two dominant wins. Clearly the class horse of the race and is the standout selection.

selections.name: One Punch Dragon
selections.reason: Classy individual who won first-up last preparation. First-up today but has the class to challenge.

selections.name: Yongam Sesang
selections.reason: Finished seventh last start but is capable of much better. Consistent Class 1 performer who can surprise.

selections.name: Vet Captain
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but won two starts back. Better suited here and can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: Hero Fighter
danger_horse.reason: Finished ninth last start but is capable of much better. Solid Class 1 performer on his day.

selections.name: Pasa Spurt
selections.reason: Finished a close fourth first-up over 1m. Fitter for that run and drop in distance to 7f is a major positive.

selections.name: Lala K
selections.reason: Won last start over 6f in impressive fashion. Progressive type who should handle the step up to 7f.

selections.name: Hangang Perfect
selections.reason: Won last start over 1 1/8m. Drop in distance is a query but inside draw is a massive advantage.

selections.name: Best Thor
selections.reason: Won last start over 1 1/8m. Drop in distance is a query but is in great form and must be respected.

danger_horse.name: Smiling Prince
danger_horse.reason: Finished a close second last start over 7f. Rates highly on speed figures and is a major threat.
